nasb.text: Blowing toward the south, Then turning toward the north, The wind continues swirling along; And on its circular courses the wind returns.

esv.text: The wind blows to the south and goes around to the north; around and around goes the wind, and on its circuits the wind returns.

cnv.text: 風向南颳，又往北轉， 循環周行，旋轉不息。

ccb.text: 风吹向南，又转向北， 循环不息，周而复始。

csbs.text: 风向南吹，又向北转， 不停地回转， 回到自己的循环。
